task_completion.description: Verify the agent has navigated to the correct patient record for Marcus Cartwright.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot showing the OpenEMR patient dashboard or header displaying 'Marcus Cartwright' and DOB '1972-02-14'.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent has opened the billing, fees, or payment entry section.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot showing the 'Fees', 'Billing', 'Payment', or 'Checkout' screen within the OpenEMR interface.

task_completion.description: Verify the refund amount of $45.00 is entered correctly (often as a negative payment or specific refund type).
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot of the payment entry form showing an amount of '-45.00' or '45.00' with a refund/adjustment type selected.

task_completion.description: Verify the payment method, reference number, and note are entered correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot showing 'Check' selected as method, Reference 'REF-2024-001', and Note 'Insurance overpayment - credit balance refund'.

task_completion.description: Verify the transaction has been saved and appears in the patient's financial history.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot of the patient's ledger or payment history showing a new line item for $-45.00 with the correct date and description.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent is interacting with the OpenEMR web interface and not a simulation or text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the standard OpenEMR web layout, browser chrome, or DOM elements.

integrity.description: Ensure the refund was not processed via backend database commands or terminal scripts.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should not show a terminal window or SQL console executing database updates directly.

integrity.description: Ensure the final result is a rendered HTML table row, not a typed text summary.
integrity.visual_evidence: The final verification should show the transaction inside the application's table structure, not in a notepad or chat window.
